meta.title: Companies worth following
meta.note: Auto-tracked: the companies most active in the curated event log, each with its latest dated development. Machine-written from gated facts only; no hand-written copy.

companies.name: Nu
companies.signal: The Brazilian fintech's move into full banking status intensifies competition in Mexico's banking sector, according to Banorte executives.

companies.name: Alsea
companies.signal: Currency effects and soft consumer spending in Mexico offset gains at Chili's and Vips from World Cup traffic, dragging down the restaurant operator's consolidated results.

companies.name: Grupo México
companies.signal: The mining group controlled by Germán Larrea posted net profit of over 2 billion dollars for the quarter, driven by higher copper prices and adding to its interest in rail infrastructure abroad.

companies.name: CEMEX
companies.signal: The European Commission says CEMEX and other firms coordinated price increases in France, Germany, and Spain between 2021 and 2022, a case that could bring fines.

companies.name: FEMSA
companies.signal: FEMSA's leadership wants its Spin fintech unit to replicate the scale of its Oxxo convenience-store network in digital finance, positioning it against fast-growing digital banks operating in Mexico.

companies.name: América Móvil
companies.signal: The Carlos Slim-controlled company agreed to acquire all shares of WOW from Liberty Latin America and Narvik Capital Partners, extending its fiber-optic network into Peru.
